avyProblems.description: Primary concern across ALL regions. Unseasonably hot temps = short or zero refreeze windows. If you sink boot-top deep in wet snow, get off steep slopes.
Still lurking on N/NE aspects at upper elevations. Vail/Summit and San Juans have active Dry January Layer issues.

stormWatch.forecast: Light system grazing mountains Thu night → Friday. Expecting <1" above 10k'. Cooling into Friday with highs dropping ~10°F. Slight chance showers Sat PM.
Dry through weekend. Warm pattern continues.
